Mtn To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted & For Monetary Sanctions (Re-Notice)
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Off calendar as the matter was dismissed by court order of January 19, 2006. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung.

Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted and For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The motion was not filed 16 court days prior to this date, plus 5 days for mailing. The motion was filed on November 28, 2005. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
